children.title: My Children
children.subtitle: Everything your children do on Alexandria, synced from their devices.
children.emptyDescription: Ask your child for the invite code shown on their activation screen, then add them here.
children.addModalBody: Paste the invite code from your child's activation screen. Accepting it activates their profile and links their activity to this account. Both devices need to be online to complete the link.

detail.unlinkConfirm: Unlink this child? Their profile will be gated again until another guardian accepts a new invite.
detail.noActivityDescription: Progress appears here once their device syncs.
detail.noEnrollmentsDescription: Courses your child enrolls in will appear here.
detail.noSubmissionsDescription: Graded work and instructor-reviewed submissions appear here.
detail.noClassroomsDescription: Classrooms your child joins appear here.
